summary: Exact quarter-turn rotation (turns * 90 deg clockwise, mod 4) as a bijective integer pixel remap; no resampling. Four turns is the identity; odd turns transpose the extent.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The rotated image (extent transposed for odd turns; all other descriptor fields preserved).

params.name: turns
params.doc: Number of 90-degree clockwise quarter-turns, taken modulo 4 (negative turns rotate counter-clockwise).

perceptual.reason: image.rotate90 is a bijective integer pixel remap copying samples verbatim; correctness is verified by exact pixel-correspondence fixtures and the four-turn identity, not a perceptual-quality metric
